title.en: After a while, his strength had skyrocketed.

content.en:
After the Infinite Dao reached the realm of Xiaocheng, Ye Tian began to create the top Infinite Dao Control Technique, and he perfected his own Infinite Dao Control Technique one by one to the level of the top Infinite Dao Control Technique.

After a while, his strength had skyrocketed.

Subsequently, he went to the Qi Blood Heavenly Tower again, and first went to the fourth floor, although he was defeated, but he did not resist at all, but fought for a while before he was defeated.

Moreover, he can easily break through the third floor.

This means that his strength is definitely at the top of the third tier.

At this level, he was very close to the second tier of the Ninefold Origin Ancestor, and if he became stronger, it would be enough to rank among the second echelons of the Ninefold Ancestor.

The number of Ninefold Ancestors of the Second Rank was very small, only more than three hundred, which was the number of Ninefold Ancestors who had reached the Second Rank among all the forces in the entire Silent Black Sea.

And if it is distributed to the Nine-Fold Building, the number of Ninefold Ancestors who rank second in the ladder is only more than fifty.

In other words, Ye Tian's current strength is already in the top 100 among the Nine Floors.

After ranking in the third rank of the Ninefold Origin Ancestor, Ye Tian had an additional 500,000 years of Origin Realm Era cultivation time in the Infinite Time and Space, so he didn't need to worry about this problem for the time being.

This long time was enough for him to raise the Infinite Dao to the Dacheng realm, and maybe his combat power would be enough to rank second at that time!

......

Cut off the exclusion zone.

this day.

Ye Tian received a message from the Soul Elder, so he immediately came to the lair of the Soul Splitting Red Beast Clan and met the Soul Elder.

"Soul Old!"

After Ye Tian saw the soul elder, he said respectfully.

After the soul elder saw Ye Tian, he said, "Tianhe, follow me!"

Tianhe was the name of Ye Tian's Soul Splitting Red Beast's body, after all, it was impossible for him to use his real name, Ye Tian.

Subsequently.

Ye Tian followed the Soul Elder to an unknown place in the Forbidden Zone, and in addition to him, the Soul Splitting Red Beast also had a transformation level.

Not long after, Ye Tian saw the Truncated Forbidden Zone to the Enhancement Level, and almost all of them came here, and he also saw other Transform Level.

At this time, Ye Tian was very puzzled about what he was going to do, but it was definitely not a trivial matter.

At this time, the soul elder finally revealed: "Wait a minute, you will enter the first treasure land that cuts off the forbidden area, the Xiaguang Gap. Remember, the glow gap only appears at a certain time, and only for a certain period of time, and must come out within a certain time, otherwise it will never come out, and even we at the highest level will not be able to save you. "

"The glow of the glow?"

Ye Tian was stunned, he had never heard of this place at all, it was obviously a big secret to cut off the forbidden area.

Subsequently, the soul elder told the secret of the gap in the glow.

It turns out that after entering the gap of the glow, only a special ray of glow is needed to strengthen the soul, increase understanding, and enhance wisdom.

Many of the creatures that cut off the forbidden area lack wisdom, although they are not as brainless as the primordial antiquities, but the wisdom is really not comparable to that of cultivators, and this special glow can increase wisdom.

Of course, these supreme strengtheners will not let those ordinary clansmen enter the gap of the glow, the main reason is that they can't survive, the suppression there is terrifying, and if they don't have the strength of the transformation level, they are looking for death, and even coming out is a luxury.

Therefore, chemical grade is the minimum requirement.

In addition, the entrance to the glow gap cannot accommodate too many chemical levels at one time, otherwise it will cause turbulence at the entrance, which is prone to major problems.

Therefore, there is a limit to the number of places that can be sent into the gap in the forbidden area, for example, the Soul Splitting Red Beast clan only has two places.

Soon, Ye Tian saw the entrance of the Xiaguang Gap, which was a space-time crack that emitted a special light.

"Let's go inside!"

Soul Elder said.

Without the slightest hesitation, Ye Tian directly passed through this space-time crack and entered the gap of the glow.

Entering here, Ye Tian knew why this place was called the Xiaguang Gap.

It was an area that emitted a special glow, and beyond this area was darkness, and this area was very thin and thin, like a gap.

Ye Tian didn't dare to explore the dark area, according to the Soul Elder's advice, he could only stay in this gap in the glow and not leave here, otherwise he would be swallowed by the darkness, and even if it was at the transformation level, he would definitely die.

Ye Tian naturally wouldn't be stupid enough to go to that dark area, after all, there was no way to even reach the enhancement level, so he naturally didn't think he was special.

Besides, he has a plan of his own!

......

A ray of light appeared!

Ye Tian and the other chemical levels began to snatch this ray of glow, and soon he snatched a ray of glow and integrated it into the depths of his soul, and then absorbed this ray of glow to strengthen his soul.

Although this is only a copy body, and it is also the body of the Soul Splitting Red Beast, strengthening the soul is not good for the main body, but it is not bad if this copy body is strong.

"This ray of light is incredible, it has greatly improved the soul of this replicating body, and its comprehension has also improved!"

Ye Tian was surprised.

It's an unimaginable treasure resource, and there seems to be a lot of light here.

Next, Ye Tian began to continuously absorb the glow to strengthen his soul.

Since the talent of this body was already very powerful, the speed at which it absorbed the Refining Glowlight was also stronger than that of other chemical levels.

But after only refining hundreds of rays of glow, the entire glow crack began to vibrate.

"Get out of the glow crevice!"

One of the incarnates was nervous, and he didn't dare to delay a little time, for fear that he wouldn't be able to escape from here.

Therefore, almost in an instant, these avatar levels fled, leaving only Ye Tian alone.

"Copy!"

Ye Tian began to copy his human body.

Although he does not have a copy talent on his copy body, he has the mark of a copy talent, and if he uses the mark, he can still use the energy of the copy talent, and his copy ability naturally exists.

However, using the Copy Talent Mark to copy it consumes a lot of resources and time.

Therefore, Ye Tianping would not use this ability.

But now he can't bring his human copy body, so he can only copy it like this.

As a result, a lot of resources are consumed, and time is slowly passing.

"I hope it can be replicated in time!"

Ye Tian muttered.

He sped up time, and finally copied his human replica body just as the entrance to the glow gap was about to dissipate.

Immediately, Ye Tian let the Soul Splitting Red Beast copy the body and escape.

After all, this replica body has already gained a lot of status in the truncated forbidden area, so naturally it can't give up like this!

When Ye Tian came out of the gap in the glow, Soul Elder immediately scolded: "Tianhe, why did you come out now?"

"Soul Elder, I just saw a cloud of light, so I went to absorb it, and it took a little time. Ye Tian said apologetically.

"Okay, just come out, don't be so reckless next time!"

Soul Elder said.

Subsequently, a group of avatars departed.

And no one knew that Ye Tian actually left a replica body in the gap of the glow.
